title: Glory Box
meaning_summary: Glory Box stays durable because it is easy to revisit and well suited to long-tail catalog listening.
revenue_drivers: Streaming and catalog discovery keep the song generating recurring revenue.
Playlist longevity supports steady repeat listening.
Licensing and cultural familiarity can add earnings beyond baseline streams.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate keeps the current headline range as the artist-side figure and models gross track, label, publishing, and songwriter lanes from that conservative annual range.

ownership.master_owner: Likely controlled through the recording label or distributor unless a specific rights sale is known
ownership.publishing_owner: Writer and publisher splits affect the publishing share shown here
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No specific catalog sale adjustment is modeled for this track
ownership.notes: Glory Box is modeled from public-facing catalog behavior and conservative rights-split assumptions, not from audited royalty statements.
